name: agent-credit-desk
description: Autonomous lending agent for Tether Hackathon Galáctica — WDK Edition 1

scripts.contracts:deploy:local: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network localhost
scripts.contracts:deploy:base-sepolia: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network baseSepolia
scripts.backend:db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.install:all: cd contracts && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
